The client approved exactly one of the two presentation candidates for final delivery. The notes do not record which candidate was approved.

- [Candidate A](../presentations/Apollo-candidate-a.pdf)
- [Candidate B](../presentations/Apollo-candidate-b.pdf)

# Internal review

The other presentation candidate remains internal review material. The notes do not record which candidate is the internal version.

- [Candidate A](../presentations/Apollo-candidate-a.pdf)
- [Candidate B](../presentations/Apollo-candidate-b.pdf)
